# ATLAS — Plugin Inventory and Health Report
<!-- Generated by generate-atlas.py — do not edit manually -->
<!-- Last generated: 2026-04-08 -->

# Recommended Skill Workflow

## Primary Workflow

```
deep-research ──► incremental-planning ──► test-plan ──► plan-review ──► fix
                                                                          │
                  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                  ▼
              roadmap (if multi-plan) ──► swarm ──► pr-review ──► fix
```

| Step | Type | What it does |
|------|------|-------------|
| deep-research | skill | Background agents + web search for thorough investigation |
| incremental-planning | skill | Interview-driven plan file in `hack/plans/` |
| test-plan | skill | UAT scenarios and acceptance criteria |
| plan-review | skill | 6 parallel reviewers evaluate the plan |
| fix | skill | Addresses findings from any review skill |
| roadmap | skill | Sequences multiple plans into phases |
| swarm | skill | 21+ agent pipeline: architect through verification |
| pr-review | skill | 6 parallel reviewers on a PR |
| quality-gate | skill | Multi-pass verification — runs in swarm Phase 7 and standalone |

## Side Workflows

- **bug-investigation ──► fix** — Report bugs interactively; background agents investigate in parallel
- **unfuck** — One-shot repo cleanup swarm (dead code, AI slop, duplication)
- **speculative** — Competing implementations in isolated worktrees; judge picks winner
- **file-audit ──► map-reduce** — Parallel codebase analysis for 20+ file workloads

---

## Plugin Inventory

### pyright-uvx (v1.0.0)

Python language server (via uvx - always latest)

### vtsls-npx (v1.0.0)

TypeScript/JavaScript language server (via npx - always latest)

### gopls-go (v1.0.0)

Go language server (requires gopls on PATH)

### vscode-html-css-npx (v1.0.0)

HTML/CSS language servers (via npx - always latest)

### rust-analyzer-rustup (v1.0.0)

Rust language server (requires rust-analyzer via rustup)

### dev-guard (v1.57.0)

Development environment policy enforcement: tool selection guard, commit validation, pre-push review, URL fetch guard, trust management, oc/kubectl introspection, subagent completion verification

#### Hooks

| Event | Matcher | Script |
|-------|---------|--------|
| SessionStart | `(any)` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py --validate` |
| PreToolUse | `Bash` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `Write` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `Edit` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `NotebookEdit` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `EnterPlanMode` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `WebFetch` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PreToolUse | `Bash` | `hooks/pre-push-review.sh` |
| PreToolUse | `mcp__.*` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| Stop | `(any)` | `uv run hooks/stop-hook.py` |
| SubagentStop | `(any)` | `uv run hooks/subagent-stop-hook.py` |
| SessionEnd | `(any)` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py --session-end` |
| PostToolUse | `Bash` | `hooks/validate-commit-message.sh` |
| PostToolUse | `Bash` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PostToolUse | `WebFetch` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |
| PostToolUse | `Read` | `uv run hooks/tool-selection-guard.py` |

#### Commands (2)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| guard-stats | Show actionable dev-guard metrics with improvement suggestions |
| trust | Manage trusted rules for dev-guard ask prompts |

| review-commits | AI-assisted commit review for PR readiness |

### github-mcp (v1.0.0)

GitHub MCP server with full toolsets for repository management, code security, and workflow automation

#### Hooks

| Event | Matcher | Script |
|-------|---------|--------|
| SessionStart | `(any)` | `echo 'You have access to a read-only GitHub MCP server (mcp__github__*). Use MCP tools for reading GitHub data (PRs, issues, actions, code security, notifications, discussions). Use the gh CLI for write operations (creating PRs, merging, creating issues). For raw.githubusercontent.com URLs, use the mcp__github__get_file_contents tool instead of WebFetch.'` |

#### MCP Servers

| Server | Type | URL |
|--------|------|-----|
| `github` | http | `https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/` |
